Gahizi Cloutier

ProfileStatsEquipmentBackgroundAssociations
Crew Record • Amelia Grace

Identity Profile

Age36
SexMale
CareerFormer Imperial Navy
SpeciesHumaniti: Mixed Solomani-Vilani

Gahizi is a former Navy Academy graduate who became a pilot for the Imperial Ministry of State. He reached the NCO rank of Petty Officer 1st Class and is a skilled spacecraft pilot, sensor operator, small craft pilot, and backup astrogator.

Command Note:

Cloutier is not qualified to captain the Amelia Grace. He is best used as flight crew, sensor watch, emergency helm, and secondary jump-support staff.

He has a reputation for liking the ladies and supposedly having “a girl in every port.” The record suggests this is exaggerated, but he does maintain an unusually wide social network.

Note: Gahizi cannot use the first aid kit himself, but crew are required to carry one for emergency use by others.

Background

Gahizi was born on Nisinasha/Banasdan/Solomani Rim (A9EA987-E). He graduated from the Naval Academy but failed to receive a commission. His naval career was competent but not especially remarkable, ending at Petty Officer 1st Class before service with the Imperial Ministry of State.

Imperial records list no allies, enemies, contacts, or rivals.
